description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat, slightly sloped roof and a minimalist exterior. The facade features a mix of large and small rectangular windows, with a prominent floor-to-ceiling window on one side and a set of double glass doors on the front. The exterior walls are clad in dark, vertically-grooved panels, contrasting with the lighter, smooth surfaces of the windows and doors. The house includes a covered carport or patio area supported by slender posts, extending from one side. The interior is partially visible, showing brown textured walls and a simple, open layout. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and functional urban living.
description: A modern, boxy house with dark vertical paneling, large windows, and a flat sloped roof, featuring a covered carport and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double glass doors, a large window, and the covered carport extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, uninterrupted wall with a large horizontal window and smaller windows, plus the carport roof.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying two tall vertical windows and the sloped roof, with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the main entrance, large window, and a person for scale, emphasizing the house's height and modern facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with no steps, flush entry, and a covered carport extending from the facade
